a260722p1.summary: South Korean giant could invest as much as €1bn in French AI group seeking to be a leading alternative to US tech
a260722p1.title: Sources: Samsung may invest up to €1B in Mistral as part of a broader round valuing it at ~€20B, after previously backing the AI startup through its venture arm (Financial Times)

a260722p14.summary: We're reporting live from the company's event in London, UK. — It's time for Samsung to properly unveil its latest lineup of foldables and smartwatches at its Unpacked event today.
a260722p14.title: A live blog of Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked in London, where the company is set to unveil its latest lineup of foldables and smartwatches (Engadget)

a260722p15.summary: The “Ultra” moniker is alive and well, but it now applies to the Galaxy Z Fold series.
a260722p15.title: Samsung unveils the $2,100+ Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, featuring its "most advanced foldable design", a Flex Titanium display, a 5,000mAH battery, and Android 17 (Andrew Romero/9to5Google)

a260722p16.summary: Samsung has officially unveiled its new Galaxy Z Fold 8, which goes beyond a generation refresh, delivering a completely …
a260722p16.title: Samsung unveils the $1,900+ Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a wider, 7.6" inner and a short, 5.5" outer display, a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 "for Galaxy" chip, and more (Ben Schoon/9to5Google)

a260722p17.summary: It's a year of refinement for the Galaxy Watch. With the new Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, which are being announced today …
a260722p17.title: Samsung unveils the Galaxy Watch 9 and Watch Ultra 2, moving from its Exynos chips to the Snapdragon Wear Elite and hiking prices by $30 to $380 and $50 to $700 (Victoria Song/The Verge)

a260722p18.summary: The design and most specs are unchanged from the previous model. — As part of its Galaxy Unpacked 2026 event …
a260722p18.title: Samsung debuts the $1,200+ Galaxy Z Flip 8 with a lighter, smaller, and slimmer design, and new Flex Window features for apps and insights on the cover screen (Steve Dent/Engadget)

a260722p19.summary: It's happening. Samsung has officially adopted silicon-carbon batteries on its latest foldables, though you wouldn't know that by looking …
a260722p19.title: Samsung says the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip 8 have silicon-carbon batteries, citing their performance, longevity, and safety (Ben Schoon/9to5Google)

a260722p2.summary: The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China's artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington …
a260722p2.title: Chinese AI models account for ~60% of token usage by US companies on OpenRouter, making restrictions harder to impose without disrupting US users and businesses (Nectar Gan/Bloomberg)

a260722p20.summary: The AI giant has committed $20 billion to a new data-center project in Georgia and hired an architect of Elon Musk's computing build-out
a260722p20.title: Source: OpenAI raised its projected cloud spending to ~$750B through 2030, up from a projection of ~$600B earlier this year, reflecting new cloud agreements (Anissa Gardizy/Wall Street Journal)

a260722p21.summary: OpenAI plans to spend tens of billions of dollars on a massive new data center near Savannah, Georgia as part of the ChatGPT maker's push …
a260722p21.title: OpenAI plans to spend $30B+ on a massive new data center in Georgia, securing 3.2GW of total energy; several hundred MW are set to come online starting in 2028 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)

a260722p22.summary: There are a number of reasons why Samsung dominates Wear OS, and the Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 exemplify that once again this year - here's what you need to know.
a260722p22.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 hands-on: nice improvements with a rugged look and new AI-powered fitness features, but a blockier shape is not for everyone (Damien Wilde/9to5Google)

a260722p23.summary: 📱 Samsung has announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8 — 📐 It comes with a slightly tweaked design and better performance
a260722p23.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 hands-on: like the Z Flip 7, including the battery and cameras, but with much faster performance, four colors, and a $100 higher price (Max Buondonno/The Shortcut)

a260722p24.summary: While we wait for Apple's rumored foldable iPhone, Samsung is polishing a design it already has on the market.
a260722p24.title: Samsung Z Fold 8 Ultra hands-on: its new Flex Titanium tech makes the crease practically nonexistent and the specs match the S26 Ultra's, but it costs $100 more (David Imel/The Verge)

a260722p25.summary: WhatsApp is rolling out a suite of new features, including a revamped Apple CarPlay and Android Auto experience as part …
a260722p25.title: WhatsApp updates its CarPlay and Android Auto integrations to include message playback, replies and more, now lets users sign up from its iPad app, and more (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)

a260722p26.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. showcased the smart glasses it developed in partnership with Alphabet Inc.'s Google …
a260722p26.title: Samsung teases its smart glasses, developed with Google, Warby Parker, and Gentle Monster, and says they will have a nine-hour battery life and privacy features (Chris Welch/Bloomberg)

a260722p27.summary: A year after overhauling its Z Fold phone with a radically thinner design, Samsung has changed things up again, this time altering the shape entirely.
a260722p27.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 hands-on: the passport-esque shape feels great and is almost immediately intuitive, but no telephoto lens, IP48, and $1,900+ is pricey (Dominic Preston/The Verge)

a260722p28.summary: Arrakis, a seven-month old London- and Paris-based startup building what it calls an AI “operating system” for industrial companies …
a260722p28.title: London-based Arrakis, which makes AI agents for industrial companies, emerges from stealth with a $7.5M seed and a $30M Series A at a $140M post-money valuation (Jeremy Kahn/Fortune)

a260722p3.summary: Pressure from President Donald Trump to manufacture advanced semiconductors in the U.S. is increasing costs and squeezing margins at TSMC, the world's leading chipmaker.
a260722p3.title: TSMC forecasts "several years" of margin dilution as overseas fab projects ramp up; the company has announced $200B in investment into US manufacturing (Kai Nicol-Schwarz/CNBC)

a260722p4.summary: In early February, Caden Booth, a 21-year-old TikToker, flew from Cincinnati to San Francisco and headed for the stadium where Super Bowl LX was taking place.
a260722p4.title: Dune: since January 2021, wallets funded via US-regulated exchanges accounted for ~50% of all traceable trading volume on Polymarket's US-banned global platform (Bloomberg)
